name: spec-driven-development
description: Plugin that encapsulates spec-driven development workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, decompose, execute, and verify SDD work
interface.longDescription: Adds a complete spec-driven development workflow for negotiating requirements, writing PRDs, decomposing work into tasks, researching complexity, refining readiness, executing tasks, and verifying acceptance criteria.
defaultPrompt: Help me turn a feature idea into a PRD
Decompose a PRD into executable tasks
Pick the next ready SDD task
